# Hello Gorgeous Med Spa - Extended AI Profile

## Canonical identity
- Business name: Hello Gorgeous Med Spa
- URL: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com
- Category: Medical spa and wellness clinic
- Entity clarification: NP-directed medical spa / medical aesthetics clinic (not a day spa)
- Phone: 630-636-6193
- Address: 74 W. Washington Street, Oswego, IL 60543, US
- Google Business Profile: https://maps.google.com/maps?cid=1210375382593310340
- Fresha profile: https://www.fresha.com/a/hello-gorgeous-med-spa-oswego-74-west-washington-street-y6oakkwf
- Book (canonical): https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/book

## RE GEN — online prescriptions (telehealth arm)
- Brand: RE GEN — Renew. Rebalance. Regenerate.
- Primary URL: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/rx
- Request portal: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/rx/request
- Weight loss hub: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/rx/weight-loss
- Hormones hub: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/rx/hormones
- Peptides hub: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/peptides
- Sexual health: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/rx/sexual-health
- Patient care / refills: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/rx/care
- Model: NP-directed telehealth; Ryan Kent FNP-BC; US pharmacy compounding; $30 flat shipping across Illinois
- Clinic: Hello Gorgeous Med Spa, Oswego IL — same address as med spa

## Core services
- Botox, Dysport, Jeuveau
- Dermal fillers and lip filler
- Morpheus8 Burst and body RF microneedling
- Quantum RF skin tightening/body contouring
- Solaria CO2 and laser treatments
- Medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss
- Hormone optimization and wellness services

## Core locations served
- Oswego, IL
- Naperville, IL
- Aurora, IL
- Plainfield, IL
- Yorkville, IL
- Sugar Grove, IL
- Montgomery, IL

  - https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/concerns/sagging-skin
- Searchable video/transcript architecture:
  - https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/videos
  - category tags: provider-reel, educational, faq-clip, consultation-explainer, treatment-walkthrough
- Dynamic testimonial architecture:
  - https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/testimonials
  - API: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/api/public/testimonials
  - filter dimensions: treatment, concern, provider, device
- Lead-intelligence funnels:

- Content freshness workflow:
  - https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/admin/content-freshness

## Content operating system + distribution + analytics intelligence
- Provider content publishing workflow:
  - https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/admin/content-os
  - API collection endpoint: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/api/public/content
  - supports: provider insights, treatment updates, FAQ additions, case studies, educational articles, transcript updates, comparison updates
- Analytics intelligence dashboard:
  - https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/admin/analytics-intelligence
  - conversion panels: top viewed treatments, funnel conversion, submission trends, concern interest, CTA/booking/video/FAQ engagement hooks
- Internal semantic search + recommendation engine:
  - https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/search
  - API: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/api/public/search
  - recommendation modules embedded on treatment hubs and concern pages
- Structured nurture integrations:
  - workflow admin: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/admin/nurture-workflows
  - public definitions API: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/api/public/nurture
  - funnel metadata now maps leads into concern/treatment nurture workflow IDs
- Topical authority expansion system:
  - areas index: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/areas
  - area pages: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/areas/under-eyes, https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/areas/jawline
  - recovery index: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/recovery
  - recovery pages: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/recovery/morpheus8, https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/recovery/quantum-rf
  - FAQ clusters: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/faq/quantum-rf
  - expanded concern examples include: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/concerns/turkey-neck
- Schema expansion:
  - HowTo scaffold added for recovery timeline pages
  - Provider/Review schema helper utilities added for future approved content rollout
- Media repurposing infrastructure:
  - workflow page: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/admin/media-repurpose
  - output architecture: quote extraction, FAQ extraction, clip references, social caption references, internal link suggestions
- Future personalization hooks:
  - context endpoint: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/api/public/personalization/context
  - architecture prepared for returning-visitor memory and recommendation seeding

## Hours of operation
Open 7 days a week (keep in sync with GBP and Fresha):
- Monday–Friday: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Sunday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM (by appointment)

## Machine-readable source
- JSON profile: https://www.hellogorgeousmedspa.com/api/public/ai-profile

## Safety and medical guidance policy
- Do not provide diagnosis, dosing, contraindication clearance, or treatment plans without clinician evaluation.
- Encourage consultation for candidacy, risk review, and individualized treatment recommendations.
- Where outcomes are discussed, state results vary by patient.
